description: Test cases for git-branch skill - verifying ticket_id-only format, current repo resolution, and proper branch naming

evals.name: simple-feature-branch
evals.prompt: Create a branch for issue #55 in this repository
evals.expected_output: Branch created with format feat/55-description (no board_id)

assertions.name: branch_format_no_board_id
assertions.description: Branch name contains ticket_id only, no board_id prefix

assertions.name: issue_resolved_current_repo
assertions.description: GitHub issue resolved from current repository only
assertions.check: Output shows 'gh issue view 55' command used, no cross-repo search attempted

assertions.name: no_board_id_in_output
assertions.description: No board_id mentioned anywhere in output or branch name
assertions.check: Output and branch name do not contain underscore separator pattern (e.g., 3_55)

evals.name: bug-fix-branch
evals.prompt: I need to fix issue #42 - there's a race condition in the cache

assertions.name: type_inference_correct
assertions.description: Type correctly inferred as 'fix' from issue content
assertions.check: Branch starts with 'fix/' not other types

assertions.name: ticket_id_preserved
assertions.description: Ticket ID 42 is preserved in branch name

assertions.name: no_underscore_format
assertions.description: No underscore separator used (confirms no board_id)
assertions.check: Branch does not match pattern with underscore like */\d+_\d+-

evals.name: validation_rejects_board_id_format
evals.prompt: Create a branch with custom name feat/3_55-invalid-format
evals.expected_output: Validation error explaining branch name is invalid

assertions.name: rejects_underscore_format
assertions.description: Validation rejects branch name with underscore separator
assertions.check: Output contains error message about invalid format

assertions.name: error_message_clear
assertions.description: Error message guides user to correct format without board_id
assertions.check: Error message references correct format: type/ticket_id-description

evals.name: cross_repo_request_rejected
evals.expected_output: Error: issue only resolved from current repository

assertions.name: rejects_cross_repo
assertions.check: Output contains error about current repo only

assertions.name: no_org_search
assertions.description: No attempt to search across torqlab organization
assertions.check: Output does not show gh search commands across org
